design_elements: large rose graphic emerging from clouds on front center
consensus.overall_description: A dark forest green pullover hoodie featuring a large white and black illustrated graphic of a rose blooming from clouds on the front center. The hoodie has a classic silhouette with kangaroo pocket, drawstring hood, and ribbed cuffs and hem.
patches: small woven tag on the left sleeve cuff
consensus.stitching_details: Visible double-needle stitching on the pocket, cuffs, and shoulder seams.

claude: large rose graphic emerging from clouds on front center

values.claude: A dark forest green pullover hoodie featuring a large white and black illustrated graphic of a rose blooming from clouds on the front center. The hoodie has a classic silhouette with kangaroo pocket, drawstring hood, and ribbed cuffs and hem.
values.gemini: A dark charcoal gray pullover hoodie featuring a large, embroidered graphic of two roses emerging from a cloud on the chest. The hoodie has a classic construction with a kangaroo pocket, ribbed cuffs and hem, and an attached hood with drawstrings.

gemini: small woven tag on the left sleeve cuff

values.gemini: Visible double-needle stitching on the pocket, cuffs, and shoulder seams.
